title: How many Dashboards are available on the Standard Plan?
excerpt: I’m on the standard plan and it says that I can make a dashboard that combines up to 5 boards. When I try to do that it says upgrade plan. What am I doing wrong? :slight_smile:

posts.author: rosiedehaan (Rosie )
posts.cookedHtml: I’m on the standard plan and it says that I can make a dashboard that combines up to 5 boards. When I try to do that it says upgrade plan. What am I doing wrong?

posts.author: JulieLucidDay (julie@lucidday.com)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @rosiedehaan have you tried contacting support@monday.com about this one? That might be the fastest answer.

posts.author: simon_blinno (Simon Blickenstorfer)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you linked one of the boards with other boards? Possibly these count as well?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Unless monday has changed the limit to count the full hierarchy of boards down the chain, so to speak, it should only count the actual specific boards connected @simon_blinno . Interesting, I’m going to check on that.

posts.author: simon_blinno (Simon Blickenstorfer)
posts.cookedHtml: That is exactly my guess, but I have not tried it myself. Please update if you find out anything. Thank you!

posts.author: rosiedehaan (Rosie )
posts.cookedHtml:
It is possible to create a dashboard but the widgets I find useful aren’t part of the standard plan. Among others:
The Chart Widget
Org Chart widget
The Workload Widget
The Pivot Board Widget
The Overview Widget

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
